moduleTitle: Identification, assessment, and management of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities
questionText: Are the interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities assessed?
questionKo: 귀사의 환경 의존성 , 임팩트 ( impacts), 리스크 및 / 또는 기회 간의 상호연결성 ( interconnection) 이 평가되었습니까 ?
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Biodiversity, Plastics, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Financial services, Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Nature-related disclosures should be integrated with other business and sustainability-related disclosures, whenever possible, to provide report users with an integrated and holistic picture of the organization's financial position and prospects. Integration of climate- and nature-related disclosures is of particular importance. It is important that any alignment, synergies, contributions and possible trade-offs between climate and nature are clearly identified. This question demonstrates that assessing the interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and opportunities is part of the organization's assessment process.

columns.text: Interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities assessed
columns.textKo: Interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회 assessed

columns.text: Description of how interconnections are assessed
columns.textKo: Description of how interconnections are assessed

columns.text: Primary reason for not assessing interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities, or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 for not assessing interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회
optionsKo: 부족 internal resources, capabilities, 또는 expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant 또는 not 관련

columns.text: Explain why you do not assess the interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities
columns.textKo: 그 이유를 설명 you do not assess the interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회

guidance.text:
Interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities assessed (column 1) 
Select "Yes" if you assess the interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities. This includes whether you have assessed the extent to which any risks may arise from your activities linked to environmental dependencies and/or impacts. 
For instance, if you have identified that your organization is dependent on certain ecosystem services (e.g., flood mitigation services), you may have assessed this dependency in the context of forests, water, and climate-related risks.
Description of how interconnections are assessed (column 2) 
This column only appears if "Yes" is selected in column 1 "Interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities assessed".
Provide a brief description of the framework or methodology used to integrate your assessment of different environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities into a single process. This could include guidance from relevant reporting standards or protocols developed internally.
Describe how this process is incorporated into the assessment process disclosed in 2.2.2.
Describe the process for identifying any alignment, synergies, contributions and possible trade-offs between dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities.
Provide examples of how you consider the interconnections between dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities and describe how you assessed the issues together rather than separately.
If you have assessed the interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities but have faced challenges in integrating all these aspects into a holistic approach, explain the reasons for this difficulty.
Explain why you do not assess the interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities (column 4) 
This column only appears if "No" is selected in column 1 "Interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities assessed".
Describe the primary reason selected in column 2 "Primary reason for not assessing interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities" and describe any plans to do so in the future.
If you selected "Judged to be unimportant or not relevant" in column 3 "Primary reason for not assessing interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities", explain the criteria used to decide that assessing the interconnections between environmental issues was not important or relevant to your organization.
guidance.textKo: Interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회 assessed (열 1) Select "예" 만약 you assess the interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회. This includes whether you have assessed the extent to which 하나 이상 리스크 may arise from your activities linked to 환경 의존성 및/또는 임팩트. For instance, 만약 you have identified that 귀사 is dependent on certain ecosystem services (e.g., flood mitigation services), you may have assessed this dependency in the context of forests, water, 및 climate-related 리스크. Description of how interconnections are assessed (열 2) This 열 only appears 만약 "예" is 선택 in 열 1 "Interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회 assessed". Provide a brief description 의 framework 또는 방법론 used to integrate your assessment of different 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회 into a single 프로세스. This could include guidance from 관련 reporting 기준 또는 protocols developed internally. 설명 how this 프로세스 is incorporated into the assessment 프로세스 공개 in 2.2.2. 설명 the 프로세스 for identifying 하나 이상 alignment, synergies, contributions 및 possible trade-offs between dependencies, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회. Provide examples of how you consider the interconnections between dependencies, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회 및 설명 how you assessed the issues together rather than separately. 만약 you have assessed the interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회 but have faced challenges in integrating all these aspects into a holistic approach, explain the reasons for this difficulty. 그 이유를 설명 you do not assess the interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회 (열 4) This 열 only appears 만약 "아니요" is 선택 in 열 1 "Interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회 assessed". 설명 the 주된 이유 선택 in 열 2 "주된 이유 for not assessing interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회" 및 설명 하나 이상 plans to do so in the future. 만약 you 선택 "Judged to be unimportant 또는 not 관련" in 열 3 "주된 이유 for not assessing interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회", explain the 기준 used to decide that assessing the interconnections between 환경 이슈 was not important 또는 관련 to 귀사.

guidance.text: The organization assesses the interconnections between environmental dependencies, impacts, risks and/or opportunities and identifies any alignment, synergies, contributions and possible trade-offs.
guidance.textKo: The organization assesses the interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및/또는 기회 및 identifies 하나 이상 alignment, synergies, contributions 및 possible trade-offs.

guidance.text: Trade-offs: the strategic choices made by an organization to balance environmental dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities, while acknowledging and managing any conflicts or compromises that arise in pursuit of a single holistic approach.
guidance.textKo: Trade-offs: the strategic choices made by an organization to balance 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회, while acknowledging 및 managing 하나 이상 conflicts 또는 compromises that arise in pursuit of a single holistic approach.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this question.

moduleTitleKo: 환경 의존성, 임팩트, 리스크 및 기회의 식별, 평가 및 관리
issueTagsKo: 수자원, 해양, 생물다양성, 플라스틱, Climate Change, 산림
sectorTagsKo: 금융 서비스, 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: Nature-related 공시s 해야 합니다 be integrated with other business 및 sustainability-related 공시s, whenever possible, to provide report users with an integrated 및 holistic picture 의 조직의 financial position 및 prospects. Integration of climate- 및 nature-related 공시s is of particular importance. It is important that 하나 이상 alignment, synergies, contributions 및 possible trade-offs between climate 및 nature are clearly identified. This 문항 demonstrates that assessing the interconnections between 환경 의존성, impacts, 리스크 및 기회 is part 의 조직의 assessment 프로세스.
